Hydraulic delay module
======================

Import
------

.. code-block:: python

   from asm2dmodel import hyddelay

Class
-----

``HydDelay(XINITDELAY, PAR1, T)``

Parameters
----------

- ``XINITDELAY``: initial delay state vector
- ``PAR1``: ASM2d parameter vector used by the block interface
- ``T``: time constant

Notes
-----

This page documents the module-level interface intended for future flowsheet construction.
